summary: Iteration 13 testing complete for Profile Page 'My Applications' tab with re-edit feature. All backend APIs (9/9 tests passed) and frontend UI working correctly. Features tested: Bursary/Training applications display, status badges, Edit button within 24hr window, Request Re-edit button after 24hr expiry, Re-edit dialog with reason input, Allow re-edit admin approval, and notifications.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: All re-edit APIs working correctly: POST /api/applications/{id}/request-re-edit, PUT /api/applications/{id}/allow-re-edit, POST /api/training-applications/{id}/request-re-edit, PUT /api/training-applications/{id}/allow-re-edit
24hr edit window enforcement working in PUT /api/applications/{id} and PUT /api/training-applications/{id} - returns 403 if window expired and re_edit_approved is false
Notifications created for admins on re-edit request and for users on approval/denial
Re-edit flags (re_edit_requested, re_edit_approved) properly cleared after successful edit (consumed)

data-testid attributes properly implemented: bursary-app-{id}, training-app-{id}, edit-bursary-{id}, edit-training-{id}, request-reedit-bursary-{id}, request-reedit-training-{id}, status-badge-{status}, re-edit-reason-input, submit-re-edit-request
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (7 bursary apps, 1 training app for Jane Smith)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile page My Applications tab fully tested. Jane Smith (super_admin) has 7 bursary applications and 1 training application. Most apps submitted recently (18-19 Feb 2026) so within 24hr window showing Edit button. One bursary app from 20 Feb 2026 shows Request Re-edit button (24hr window expired). The training application shows 'Re-edit approved — you can now edit' green text indicating previous approval. All 5 profile tabs working: Profile Info, My Applications, Security, Documents, Account Info.

Profile_My_Applications_Tab.bursary_applications_card: PASS - shows 7 applications with status badges
Profile_My_Applications_Tab.status_badges: PASS - Under Review, Pending, Draft badges visible
Profile_My_Applications_Tab.edit_button_within_24hr: PASS - 7 Edit buttons for recent submissions
Profile_My_Applications_Tab.request_reedit_button_after_24hr: PASS - 1 Request Re-edit button for Feb 20 submission
Profile_My_Applications_Tab.reedit_approved_indicator: PASS - Training app shows green 'Re-edit approved — you can now edit'

Re_edit_Dialog.explanation_text: PASS - 'The 24-hour edit window for your Bursary Application has expired.'
Re_edit_Dialog.submit_button: PASS - data-testid='submit-re-edit-request', enabled when reason filled

Backend_Re_edit_APIs.POST_applications_request_re_edit: PASS - 200 response, creates notification for admins
Backend_Re_edit_APIs.PUT_applications_allow_re_edit: PASS - 200 response, creates notification for user

Other_Profile_Tabs.account_info: PASS - Account Information with User ID, Status, Roles
